headline: War? Inflation? The Market Is Moving On.
summary: The cease-fire announced on Tuesday led to the best day for the stock market in almost exactly a year. But it’s too soon to look past the war.

raw.headline: War? Inflation? The Market Is Moving On.
raw.summary: The cease-fire announced on Tuesday led to the best day for the stock market in almost exactly a year. But it’s too soon to look past the war.

headline: Hormuz Is Still in Dire Straits. 2 Oil-Services Stocks That Could Benefit.
summary: Iran has discovered that controlling the Strait of Hormuz “is probably a much more powerful deterrent than being a threshold nuclear power ever was.”

raw.headline: Hormuz Is Still in Dire Straits. 2 Oil-Services Stocks That Could Benefit.
raw.summary: Iran has discovered that controlling the Strait of Hormuz “is probably a much more powerful deterrent than being a threshold nuclear power ever was.”

headline: SLB HydraWell Deal Expands Well Decommissioning Role And Valuation Debate
summary: SLB (NYSE:SLB) has completed its acquisition of Norway based HydraWell Intervention AS. The deal adds proprietary well plug and abandonment and integrity remediation technology to SLB's portfolio. The transaction expands SLB's role in well decommissioning and end of life well solutions. For investors watching NYSE:SLB, this move comes with the stock at $52.54 and a value score of 5. The shares show returns of 6.3% over the past week, 9.2% over the past 30 days and 30.7% year to date. Over...
